name: Alabama Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Alabama - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Nurse Aide Registry
Alabama Department of Public Health
The RSA Tower
P.O. Box 303017
Montgomery, AL 36130-3017

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: How much does Alabama CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The endorsement application fee is $125. Additional costs may include background check fees.
Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Alabama.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Alabama?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 8 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Alabama while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
